chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP. No. D- 869 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 12.08.2025 For orders on MA 5952/25 For orders on MA 5953/25 None present for the Petitioner Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani, A.P.G. Mr. Rafiq Ahmed Dahri, Asstt: A.G. 1. Urgency granted. 2. In view of the recent amendments introduced by the Provincial Assembly of Sindh through the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances (Amendment) Act, 2024 (Sindh Act No. VIII of 2024), whereby Section 35 of the principal Act has been substituted, vesting jurisdiction in the “Special Courts” or “Competent Courts” to entertain bail applications and considering that the said amendment is pending assent by the Governor of Sindh and publication in the official Gazette, this Court presently lacks jurisdiction and is rendered coram non judice. Learned A.A.G. Sindh and A.P.G. Sindh present in Court in other matters state that this petition be disposed of accordingly. In view of the above, the listed application is allowed and the instant petition is disposed of as withdrawn leaving the petitioner at liberty to approach the court concerned. The said Court shall entertain and decide the bail application of the applicant on merits, in light of the guidelines laid down by this Court in C.P. No. D- 625 of 2025 (Re: Hafeezullah Lashari v. Province of Sindh and others) at Circuit Court Larkana and C.P. No. D-725 of 2025 (Re: Peer Bux v. The State and others) at Circuit Court Hyderabad. JUDGE JUDGE Tufail Ahmed/PA*
